design_decisions: Created profiler.py for core orchestration logic and functional entry points.
Created wrapper.py for the ProfileReport compatibility class to keep the entry point lean.
Updated __init__.py to re-export the public API, maintaining backward compatibility.
Exported Profiler and InternalProfileReport from __init__.py to support existing deep-import tests.
results: Successfully refactored the package structure. Verified with 161 tests and passed Principal Engineer review. PR #25 opened.
